title: Market Outcome
description: Represents empirical market behavior captured intraday (ATO/ATC). Conforms to schema.org Observation type — see 008-schema-org-mapping-v01.md.

@type.description: Maps to schema.org Observation — an observed measurement of market behavior.

atoPrice.description: Opening price. Maps to variableMeasured[0] as QuantitativeValue in schema.org.

atcPrice.description: Closing price. Maps to variableMeasured[1] as QuantitativeValue in schema.org.

volatilityIndex.description: Intraday volatility proxy. Maps to variableMeasured[2] as PropertyValue in schema.org.

returnPct.description: Intraday return percentage. Maps to variableMeasured[3] as PropertyValue in schema.org.

actualRegime.description: Ground truth regime. Maps to measuredProperty in schema.org, referencing the PSI DefinedTermSet.
